posts.text: After 80 years without a direct, all-out conflict between great powers, a dismaying number of leaders seem to be spoiling for a fight, national interests be damned https://www.economist.com/international/2026/05/05/america-must-hope-donald-trump-is-not-a-new-caligula?taid=69fc93dd0fdc870001c62b34&utm_campaign=trueanthem&utm_medium=social&utm_source=twitter
posts.author: TheEconomist

posts.text:
BREAKING: The US Department of Justice is investigating a series of "suspiciously timed" oil trades ahead of major announcements by President Trump and a top Iranian official about the Iran War.

The DOJ and CFTC are probing at least 4 of these trades where traders made a total of more than $2.6 billion.
posts.author: KobeissiLetter

posts.text: Chatted with my buddies @maxwiethe and @roojoo3 about a bunch of the macro trends that @KEDM_COM has been covering lately. We’ve nailed a bunch of winning themes over the years…👇👇
